3030260.name: Familiar Friends: What's Your Familiar?
3030260.description:
(This game, as well as many others in our bundle, is FANTASTIC for Youtubers & Streamers to create content and engage with their audience. This creates a unique experience for all parties involved, and players playing the game themselves can enjoy the solo experience tremendously all on their own as well!)

Familiar Friends





Familiar Friends can be described as a relaxing, companion-finder simulation.
A cute and cozy Visual Novel experience with plenty of choices to make, you'll answer a plethora of informative questions to find a Familiar truly meant for you!
Come meet a colorful cast of quirky companions as you enter The Conjuring Chamber and make new friends;
All to a relaxing and invigorating Original Soundtrack.


Features:


  • Player - Developer interaction.
  • An opportunity to be selected to choose the name of a character for future episodes as a token of our gratitude for your support.
  • An atmospheric, cozy experience that's short enough to complete in one sitting.
  • Wonderful Soundtrack by A Beautiful Collection of Darkness
  • A Multitude of endings based on your answers and choices.
  • FREE! ♥ (I mean, why not, right?
3030260.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
